summary: User wants to create a website. No further details provided yet.

existing_features.title: Create a fully functional multi-section landing website with a home hero section, an about section, a features/services section, and a contact/footer section. Each section should be clearly navigable via a sticky top navigation bar.

Apply a bold, modern visual theme across the entire site using a dark charcoal and warm amber color palette, clean sans-serif typography, generous whitespace, and subtle card shadows. The style should feel professional and contemporary, with consistent spacing and hover interactions on interactive elements.

Update the contact information displayed in the ContactFooter component (frontend/src/components/ContactFooter.tsx) with placeholder-ready fields for address, phone number, and email address, clearly labeled and easy to locate for future edits. Replace any existing hardcoded contact details with updated, realistic-looking example values.

new_feature_requests.summary: Update/change the contact information on the website
